form.formComment: Two back was tenth after being driven well back, behind Jeffcoate at this track over 1660m in a 3yo+ NR 40 to 45 on March 27 at $15. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5 m finishing second behind Lulu Lucifer at Marburg over 1850m in a 3yo+ NR 43 to 48 on April 5 at $6.50. Rates highly. Top chance in this line-up.

Winning claims.
